With regular competitive activities and enjoyable recreational social match play, leagues, tournaments, and events to provide a vibrant environment, Tennis 360 is your tennis and padel community away from home.

UAE JJ Fitness MBZ Gym with 2 outdoor padel courts.
Managed by Padel Beast.

Vamos Padel is a new padel club located in Khalifa City, Abu Dhabi.
The facilities include 4 panoramic padel courts and 2 individual solo courts, perfect for both matches and training. The club also features a reception area, comfortable changing rooms with showers, a cafeteria with a restaurant-style setup and takeaway options, a fully equipped sports shop, and free parking for visitors.
Vamos Padel aims to create a friendly and active community where players can enjoy the sport, meet others, and spend time in a relaxed environment before or after their games.

properties.DETAILS_PAGE_DESCRIPTION:
Welcome to A PADEL - Rebound
Located in Abu Dhabi, A PADEL - Rebound offers 5 world-class courts, including 2 private courts with separate access for a more exclusive experience. We provide expert coaching for all levels, helping you improve your game with personalized training. Our Pro Shop is stocked with top-quality padel gear, from rackets to shoes and apparel. Enjoy refreshments at our on-site café and store your belongings in our secure locker facilities. Part of the A PADEL network, we offer a premier padel experience across Abu Dhabi.

**Zayed Sports City Padel powered by Prime Sports**
Located in the heart of Abu Dhabi, Zayed Sports City Padel powered by Prime Sports offers a premium padel experience for players of all levels. Featuring world-class courts, expert coaching, and a vibrant calendar of matches, leagues, and social events, it is the ultimate destination for padel enthusiasts.
Whether you are stepping onto the court for the first time or competing at a higher level, our programs are designed to bring players together in an energetic and welcoming environment. With professional management by Prime Sports, you can expect top-quality facilities, well-organised events, and a community-driven approach to sport.
Zayed Sports City Padel is more than just a place to play, it’s a hub for fitness, fun, and connection.
